title: PGYTECH OneGo Pocket Sling Bag for DJI OSMO Pocket 3 & Action Cameras, Lightweight Crossbody Portable Mini Bag for Travel, Vlogging, Everyday Carry, Photography Shoulder Bag(Mist White)
features: 【All-in-One, Stylishly Professional】 2L smart capacity designed for Pocket/action cameras, plus your phone, earbuds, and daily essentials. This sling bag is perfect for both creative shoots and daily commutes in any scenario.
【Magnetic Quick-Access】 Front magnetic compartment opens with one hand. Perfect for travel, photography, vlogging, and capturing spontaneous moments—grab your gear and shoot in seconds.
【3-Layer Organized Storage】 Sandwich-style layered design with separate compartments keeps creative gear and daily items neatly sorted for quick, easy access.
【Style It Your Way】 Built-in TagPort interface compatible with Crocs Jibbitz charms. Endless DIY combinations to express your unique flair.
【Ultra-Light & Durable】 Splash-resistant, dirt-proof and wear-resistant fabric for all environments. Weighs only 260g—reduces load for comfortable all-day wear during commutes or travel.
【Refined & Reliable】 Removable strap for versatile carry options. YKK splash-resistant zipper protects your gear from water splashes.
